content: Prima, mentre stavo camminando sul marciapiede, un'auto mi ha guidato accanto e mi ha schizzato acqua addosso. Guardate questo! La mia gonna e le mie scarpe sono tutte fangose.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Earlier, as I was walking down the sidewalk, a car drove by and splashed water on me. Look at this! My skirt and shoes a
